scenes.text:
Most people quit when they are three feet
from gold. Do not be most people.

There is a story about a gold miner who gave up after digging for weeks. He sold his equipment. The buyer hired an engineer, discovered the
gold was just three feet away, and made millions. The lesson is brutal but true. You have no idea how close you are to your breakthrough.

When you feel like quitting, remember why you started. Then dig three more feet. The fact
that it is hard means you are close. Easy things do not produce meaningful results.

The last mile is always the hardest. That
is how you know you are almost there.

If you are still going, drop an emoji. You
are closer than you think. Follow for perseverance.
